positive_contracts_covered: decoded AV start-offset threshold from real mux timestamps
decoded endpoint drift using final-frame duration or observed cadence
full-color video and exact PCM mux lineage
stream count, codec, sample-rate, channel, layout, duration, and content parity
Wave30 event identity, expected frame range, owner, and av_sync_evidence corroboration
playback and runtime proof hash binding
cross-role producer authority independence and immutable production bundle allowlist
canonical-root containment, strict schemas, and transactional output
negative_contracts_covered: start offset, endpoint drift, missing timestamps, and irregular cadence
extra audio stream, wrong sample rate/channel layout, malformed mux, and unrelated audio/video
color/chroma loss that preserves grayscale luma
duplicate, missing, extra, wrong-owner, or out-of-mux anchor observations
missing, unapproved, hash-mismatched, synthetic-only, or self-authorized proof producers
cross-role authority collision and empty production allowlist
tampered hashes, non-finite values, unknown keys, root escape, output collision, and atomic preservation
